_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The 0% 12h-move rate over 41 windows makes HOLD the statistically honest default; no visible breaker (fear_greed <24 or ETF flow collapse) has appeared to justify a directional commitment.
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst forward-calls Disbelief (a rule-violating 2+ rung jump from score 31) while narrative frames current conditions as Denial; consensus enforces the ±1 rule and holds at Denial.
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed rises above 38 with btc_momentum_30d sustaining above 50 and etf_flows holding above 80
next_move.invalidated_if: fear_greed drops below 24 OR btc_momentum_30d falls below 40 with vix spiking above 75
